mapper.select: select appointment_id, appointment_no, user_id, customer_name, customer_phone, service_type, preferred_date, preferred_time, address, remark, product_id, region_id, status, assigned_to, admin_note, create_time, update_time from bh_appointment where appointment_id = #{appointmentId}
mapper.insert: insert into bh_appointment (appointment_no, user_id, customer_name, customer_phone, service_type, preferred_date, remark, region_id, status, create_time, update_time) values (#{appointmentNo}, #{userId}, #{customerName}, #{customerPhone}, #{serviceType}, #{preferredDate}, #{remark}, #{regionId}, #{status}, now(), now())
mapper.select: select appointment_id, appointment_no, user_id, customer_name, service_type, preferred_date, region_id, status, create_time, update_time from bh_appointment where user_id = #{userId} order by appointment_id desc
mapper.update:
update bh_appointment
status = #{request.status},
assigned_to = #{request.assignedTo},
admin_note = #{request.adminNote},
confirmed_at = now(),
completed_at = now(),
cancelled_at = now(),
update_time = now()
where appointment_id = #{appointmentId}
